package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for template_parse_in_handler: Template construction or parsing inside Gin handlers instead of startup-time caching.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: gin; severity: contextual.
type Rule338NegativeRecord struct {
	Name string
}

type Rule338NegativeService interface {
	Handle(context.Context, Rule338NegativeRecord) (Rule338NegativeRecord, error)
}

func scenario338Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule338NegativeService, input Rule338NegativeRecord) (Rule338NegativeRecord, int) {
	output, err := service.Handle(ctx, input)
	if err != nil {
		return Rule338NegativeRecord{}, http.StatusBadRequest
	}
	return output, http.StatusOK
}
